title: Troubleshoot timeout spike in feature fetch path
preconditions: dependency latency elevated for feature path
steps: Check feature-store dependency latency for the affected window.
Inspect client connection pool health and stale connections.
Review request queue depth and timeout rate together.
Restart stale clients if the pool is exhausted.
text:
Runbook Title: Troubleshoot timeout spike in feature fetch path
Timestamp: 2026-03-01T14:46:06Z
Service: inference-api
Component: feature-fetcher
Preconditions: timeout rate above threshold; dependency latency elevated for feature path; queue depth rising in inference-api
Steps: Check feature-store dependency latency for the affected window.; Inspect client connection pool health and stale connections.; Review request queue depth and timeout rate together.; Restart stale clients if the pool is exhausted.

title: Investigate worker saturation and queue backlog
steps: Inspect worker utilization and inflight request count.
Check queue backlog and wait time trend.
Validate whether a traffic burst exceeded configured concurrency.
Adjust worker count or reduce burst concurrency.
text:
Runbook Title: Investigate worker saturation and queue backlog
Timestamp: 2026-03-08T14:46:06Z
Service: model-server
Component: batcher
Preconditions: active workers consistently near max; queue backlog increasing; 429 or request shedding observed
Steps: Inspect worker utilization and inflight request count.; Check queue backlog and wait time trend.; Validate whether a traffic burst exceeded configured concurrency.; Adjust worker count or reduce burst concurrency.

title: Investigate DB pool exhaustion in request path
steps: Inspect DB connection utilization and pending acquires.
Check request-router error logs for connection timeout patterns.
Review recent changes in connection handling.
Restart leaking workers and retune pool size if needed.
text:
Runbook Title: Investigate DB pool exhaustion in request path
Timestamp: 2026-02-24T14:46:06Z
Service: inference-api
Component: request-router
Preconditions: DB connection acquire wait increased; timeouts affected request router; metadata lookup latency elevated
Steps: Inspect DB connection utilization and pending acquires.; Check request-router error logs for connection timeout patterns.; Review recent changes in connection handling.; Restart leaking workers and retune pool size if needed.

title: Mitigate retry storm from gateway
preconditions: backend timeout rate increased with traffic amplification
steps: Inspect retry volume and retry fan-out ratio.
Check whether a downstream dependency was already degraded.
Reduce retry concurrency and backoff aggressiveness.
Confirm backend load normalizes after retry cap is applied.
text:
Runbook Title: Mitigate retry storm from gateway
Timestamp: 2026-03-06T14:46:06Z
Service: gateway
Component: traffic-manager
Preconditions: retry volume surged abruptly; backend timeout rate increased with traffic amplification; gateway emitted repeated retry events
Steps: Inspect retry volume and retry fan-out ratio.; Check whether a downstream dependency was already degraded.; Reduce retry concurrency and backoff aggressiveness.; Confirm backend load normalizes after retry cap is applied.

title: Validate model rollout after latency regression
preconditions: model-server logs show slower inference path
steps: Compare latency before and after model rollout.
Check whether model version changed execution path or batch behavior.
Rollback if latency regression is confirmed.
Revalidate rollout with canary traffic before promotion.
text:
Runbook Title: Validate model rollout after latency regression
Timestamp: 2026-03-10T14:46:06Z
Service: model-server
Component: predictor
Preconditions: latency increased after deployment; throughput dropped post-rollout; model-server logs show slower inference path
Steps: Compare latency before and after model rollout.; Check whether model version changed execution path or batch behavior.; Rollback if latency regression is confirmed.; Revalidate rollout with canary traffic before promotion.

title: Investigate cache miss spike in feature-store
steps: Inspect cache miss ratio and invalidation events.
Check whether hot keys were evicted or invalidated unexpectedly.
Repopulate hot keys for affected services.
Confirm feature retrieval latency returns to baseline.
text:
Runbook Title: Investigate cache miss spike in feature-store
Timestamp: 2026-03-22T14:46:06Z
Service: feature-store
Component: redis-cache
Preconditions: cache miss ratio elevated; backend fetches increased after invalidation; feature retrieval latency increased
Steps: Inspect cache miss ratio and invalidation events.; Check whether hot keys were evicted or invalidated unexpectedly.; Repopulate hot keys for affected services.; Confirm feature retrieval latency returns to baseline.

steps: Restart cache nodes sequentially.
Warm a small set of keys.
Notify platform owner.
